name: hedgehog-mode-anywhere
description: Add an adorable animated hedgehog buddy to any website, powered by PostHog's hedgehog-mode engine.
comment: We compile @posthog/hedgehog-mode from vendored source (vendor/hedgehog-mode) rather than the npm dist, which pre-bundles pixi.js with an unreachable eval path that MV3 content scripts forbid. These are that engine's runtime deps.
